chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1846 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui. Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. 31.05.2022 Mr. Kirshan Kumar Bheel, Advocate for the petitioners. == Urgency is granted. By way of instant petition, the petitioners have sought for direction against the official respondents to cancel the mutation entry, if it is made in favour of private respondents and then to change Foti Khata of the subject land in favour of legal heirs of Thakerio, who happened to be original allottee whereof. Heard arguments and perused the record. The dispute with regard to the allotment of the subject land being legal or otherwise and change of Foti Khata involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its writ jurisdiction; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
